_notes.fivehour_conserve_pct: Soft band below the hard gate: at/above this, delegation targets shift to Codex/Haiku for standard+mechanical work so the Claude window is saved for what needs Claude.
_notes.statusline_style: minimal | braille | circles | plain. minimal shows `model effort · cwd` and reveals both providers' numbers only when one crosses statusline_show_pct; the others always show glyph+percentage gauges.
_notes.statusline_color: ANSI colors. minimal: accent on the model, gray path, yellow/red percentages. Gauges: yellow within 10 points of a window's threshold, red+bold past it.
_notes.statusline_show_pct: minimal style only: hide quota below this, show both providers at/above it.
_notes.statusline_accent: minimal style only: fallback hex for the model name. Resolution, nearest first: STATUSLINE_ACCENT env var; then per project (walking up from the session cwd) an explicit statusline_accent key or a custom Claude Code theme (`theme: custom:<name>` -> ~/.claude/themes/<name>.json overrides.claude) in .claude/settings(.local).json; then the globally configured theme; then this value.
_notes.hibernate_enabled: Opt-in. When a usage-limit stop is detected AND the quota cache confirms a window is near cap, a watchdog waits out the reset and resumes the session (tmux send-keys into the original pane, else `claude --resume`). It types into your terminal — leave false unless you want that.
_notes.hibernate_arm_pct: Arm hibernation on any Stop/Notification event while a window is at/above this — the limit banner itself never reaches hooks, but the quota cache reads 100% at cap.
_notes.hibernate_settle_seconds: Extra seconds past the window reset before resuming.
_notes.hibernate_max_wait_hours: Never wait longer than this; stale hibernation markers are abandoned.
_notes.fable_available_on_plan: Set true ONLY if a promo/frontier model (e.g. Fable) actually appears in Claude Code's model selector for this account. Entitlement flag only; live headroom is still gated automatically.
_notes.test_override: For routing-matrix tests. Shape: {"expires_epoch": <unix secs, <=15min out>, "claude": {"five_hour": {"used": N, "minutes_to_reset": M}, "seven_day": {"used": N, "minutes_to_reset": M}}, "codex": {"long": {"used": N, "minutes_to_reset": M}, "short": null}}. Skill ignores expired overrides and labels active ones as TEST decisions.
_notes.previous_statusline: Full prior statusLine object if one existed when this was installed, so it can be wrapped and restored. null if none. install.sh fills this in automatically.
